title: The Cave
why_this_song: The Cave by Mumford & Sons (2009) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And I won't let you choke
On the noose around your neck
And I'll find strength in pain
And I will change my ways
It's empty in the valley of your heart
The sun, it rises slowly as you walk
And all the faults you've left behind

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: It's empty in the valley of your heart
I'll know my name as it's called again

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: The sun, it rises slowly as you walk
And I won't let you choke

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Mumford & Sons one question about "The Cave", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Mumford & Sons sobre "The Cave", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "The Cave" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "The Cave" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "The Cave" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "The Cave" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "The Cave" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "The Cave" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
